title: Smart data and price transparency schemes: discussion paper
body: "The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) has published a paper that explores how price transparency schemes can help consumers make better-informed decisions, and strengthen price competition.  The paper aims to help policymakers:   understand the potential benefits of price transparency schemes assess the circumstances in which they are likely to be effective consider how they can be designed to best facilitate the benefits of competition   In November 2023, the CMA published a response to DSIT consultation: a Smart Data scheme for the UK telecoms market. This discussion paper builds on that earlier work, focusing on a subset of smart data schemes. "
